languages.text: "Хм, а ваш коллега утверждает, что это всего лишь последствия переутомления, которые вы и сами не всегда способны преодолеть".
"Hmm, but your colleague claims it is merely the result of overwork, which you yourself are not always able to overcome."
languages.original_text: "Хм, а ваш коллега утверждает, что это всего лишь последствия переутомления, которые вы и сами не всегда способны преодолеть".

traits.locale_text: "Hmm, but your colleague claims it is merely the result of overwork, which you yourself are not always able to overcome."
"Hmm, but your colleague claims it is merely the result of overwork, which you yourself are not always able to overcome."
"Hmm, but your colleague claims it is merely the result of overwork, which you yourself are not always able to overcome."

languages.text: «Hum... pero su colega afirma que se debe simplemente al exceso de trabajo, que usted mismo no siempre logra evitar».
languages.original_text: "Hmm, but your colleague claims it is merely the result of overwork, which you yourself are not always able to overcome."

traits.locale_text: «Hum... pero su colega afirma que se debe simplemente al exceso de trabajo, que usted mismo no siempre logra evitar».

languages.text: “嗯，但你的同僚说这只是过度劳累的结果，包括你有时也无法克服这种情况。”
languages.original_text: "Hmm, but your colleague claims it is merely the result of overwork, which you yourself are not always able to overcome."

traits.locale_text: “嗯，但你的同僚说这只是过度劳累的结果，包括你有时也无法克服这种情况。”

languages.text: « Hmm, mais votre collègue affirme que c'est simplement le fruit d'un surmenage, dont vous souffrez vous-même parfois. »
languages.original_text: "Hmm, but your colleague claims it is merely the result of overwork, which you yourself are not always able to overcome."

traits.locale_text: « Hmm, mais votre collègue affirme que c'est simplement le fruit d'un surmenage, dont vous souffrez vous-même parfois. »

languages.text: "Fakat meslektaşın, bunun sadece senin bile her zaman üstesinden gelemediğin aşırı çalışmanın bir sonucu olduğunu iddia ediyor."
languages.original_text: "Hmm, but your colleague claims it is merely the result of overwork, which you yourself are not always able to overcome."

traits.locale_text: "Fakat meslektaşın, bunun sadece senin bile her zaman üstesinden gelemediğin aşırı çalışmanın bir sonucu olduğunu iddia ediyor."

languages.text: 「ふむ、しかし君の同僚は、それは単なる過労の結果であり、君自身も常に克服できるわけではないと言っているぞ」
languages.original_text: "Hmm, but your colleague claims it is merely the result of overwork, which you yourself are not always able to overcome."

traits.locale_text: 「ふむ、しかし君の同僚は、それは単なる過労の結果であり、君自身も常に克服できるわけではないと言っているぞ」

languages.text: "Hmm, aber Euer Kollege sagt, Ihr habt einfach zu viel Arbeit, der Ihr nicht immer gewachsen seid."
languages.original_text: "Hmm, but your colleague claims it is merely the result of overwork, which you yourself are not always able to overcome."

traits.locale_text: "Hmm, aber Euer Kollege sagt, Ihr habt einfach zu viel Arbeit, der Ihr nicht immer gewachsen seid."
